judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to execute an SDIO transfer via Greybus, not to manage reference counts. The gb_operation_put is merely a cleanup step after the operation is used. There is no get/set/put of a refcounted object that is exposed to the caller; the operation is created and destroyed locally.
